query: vintage photograph with light leak streaks across edge film burn artifact lo-fi
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: light leak — film burn streaks, analog defects, motion-blur light trails, lo-fi authenticity

response.objective_caption: A monochrome close-up of a dark surface featuring three circular illuminated elements arranged in a horizontal row; two larger bright circles sit on the right while a smaller bright circle appears toward the left, with deep shadows filling the surrounding area and a subtle reflective sheen crossing the middle of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Heavy analog film grain blankets a soft-focus, blurry monochrome close-up of a dark surface with three circular illuminated elements; the two larger circles on the right and the smaller circle on the left are driven to pure white through extreme overexposure, while surrounding surfaces and edges dissolve into smeared, mushy texture so that fine details fail to resolve into clear form.
